title: epischoenus quadrangularis
intro: Epischoenus quadrangularis, also known as the swamp grass or quadrangular grass, is a species of sedge that grows in wetland environments. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Epischoenus quadrangularis include the relief of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Epischoenus quadrangularis include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
